Fig. 2. The framework of our proposed DVSA. DVSA processes attributes and images with pre-trained encoders and calibrates features via a bidirectional attention module. As shown in (b), the VTA block selectively enhances attribute vectors a under the guidance of visual features f , while the ATV block refines visual features f conditioned on the updated attributes â. The MI-based optimization in (c) further strengthens the semantic correlations encoded in â.
